news.title:
jeff yan: my early startup failures and what i learned  

on february 19, hyperliquid founder jeff y
news.summary:
jeff yan: my early startup failures and what i learned  

on february 19, hyperliquid founder jeff yan @chameleon_jeff  said in an interview with when shift happens that in 2018 he launched a prediction market project around the same time as kalshi and others, but it ultimately did not succeed. 

he said the "off-chain matching, on-chain settlement" infrastructure direction was correct at the time, but ideas account for only a very, very small part - the real difficulty lies in achieving product–market fit. as the market shifted from bull to bear, users were no longer willing to try on-chain products. he added that the team learned a great deal through the cycle. although the project did not succeed, he is glad to see peers from that period who persisted and are now gradually moving toward mass adoption.

news.title:
strategy, largest corporate 비트코인 holder, proposes semi-monthly strc dividends

strategy proposed to
news.summary:
strategy, largest corporate 비트코인 holder, proposes semi-monthly strc dividends

strategy proposed to change strc dividend payments from monthly to semi-monthly to reduce reinvestment lag and improve liquidity. a preliminary proxy was filed on april 17, with a 디파이nitive filing expected on april 28 to open voting, which will conclude on june 8. if approved, the new schedule would take effect on june 30, with the first payment on july 15.

news.title:
cz: my mother traveled 6 hours to see me in prison, but was turned away  

in an april 9 interview w
news.summary:
cz: my mother traveled 6 hours to see me in prison, but was turned away  

in an april 9 interview with scott melker, binance founder changpeng zhao (cz) @cz_binance  shared that his prison experience made him value his family more. he was deeply moved when his mother made a 6-hour journey to visit him in prison, only to be turned away. 

cz stated that he previously focused his energy entirely on his company, and it wasn't until he lost his freedom that he realized what he missed most wasn't material comforts, but his family. since his release, he has significantly increased the time spent with his loved ones, adding that running a company isn't the only important thing in life having a good family is equally vital.

news.title:
iran to keep strait of hormuz open during ceasefire, u.s. blockade to remain until deal reached

acc
news.summary:
iran to keep strait of hormuz open during ceasefire, u.s. blockade to remain until deal reached

according to cnn, iran announced that the strait of hormuz will be “fully open” to all commercial shipping during the ceasefire period. donald 트럼프 said iran has committed not to close the waterway, but added that the u.s. naval blockade will remain in place until a comprehensive agreement with iran is fully reached. negotiations are ongoing to finalize a broader deal to end the conflict, though key differences persist.

news.title:
owning a car in america has never been this expensive:

the total cost of vehicle ownership in the u
news.summary:
owning a car in america has never been this expensive:

the total cost of vehicle ownership in the us has risen +36% since january 2020.

motor vehicle maintenance and repair costs have 급등d +50% over the same period, jumping +6.1% yoy in march alone.

meanwhile, auto insurance prices are up +56% while motor vehicle parts and equipment are up +27%.

vehicle ownership costs account for nearly 15% of the cpi 인플레이션 formula.

this means these costs are one of the biggest drivers of the rising cost of living for american households.

car 인플레이션 is squeezing us consumers.

news.title:
foreign demand for chinese bonds is surging:

trading volume of chinese onshore bonds traded by over
news.summary:
foreign demand for chinese bonds is surging:

trading volume of chinese onshore bonds traded by overseas funds via hong kong jumped to a record $179 billion in march.

chinese onshore bonds comprise government and state-backed yuan-denominated bonds, which are accessible to foreign investors through the hong kong market.

at the same time, average daily turnover 급등d to an all-time high of $8.1 billion.

trading volume has more than doubled since october 2025.

this comes as the iran war has driven global investors to seek alternatives to traditional safe-haven assets such as us treasuries.

yuan-denominated bonds have outperformed global peers since the conflict began, supported by china's abundant liquidity and limited exposure to the energy shock.

foreign investors are piling into chinese bonds at a record pace.

news.title:
risk appetite among institutional investors is skyrocketing:

institutional investors purchased ~22%
news.summary:
risk appetite among institutional investors is skyrocketing:

institutional investors purchased ~22% more call than put options last week, the largest difference in at least 16 months, according to citadel.

monday and tuesday also saw significant institutional call option inflows, now on track for the largest weekly bullish reading since october 2024.

as a result, institutional demand for call options is up to the highest level on record.

institutional call option purchases over 5 days ending tuesday have exceeded the average since january 2025 by +37%.

by comparison, during the april 2025 market recovery, the average was surpassed by +25%.

institutional investors are piling into equities.

news.title:
hormuz message unchanged, market reaction shifts

iran’s stance on the strait of hormuz is largely u
news.summary:
hormuz message unchanged, market reaction shifts

iran’s stance on the strait of hormuz is largely unchanged: ships can pass via coordinated routes but must still coordinate with iranian authorities.

today:
🔸hormuz is “completely” open to all through the “coordinated route”: foreign minister aragchi
🔸owners still need to contact the iran revolutionary guard corp navy: (state tv citing a senior military official)

april 9:
🔸iran’s deputy foreign minister told the uk broadcaster itv in a television interview that “anybody who communicates with iranian authorities has got permission”

the key difference now is a growing sense that both sides may support a ceasefire. market reaction has also flipped—oil prices fell sharply this time, unlike the rise seen on april 9.

news.title: the bbc has announced plans to cut between 1,800 and 2,000 jobs in order to close a £500 million fun
news.summary:
the bbc has announced plans to cut between 1,800 and 2,000 jobs in order to close a £500 million funding gap. this is their largest wave of redundancies since 2011.

the bbc loses over £1 billion a year in potential revenue due to a significant increase in british households refusing to pay the compulsory tv licence fee. recent reports show a sharp rise in both evasion and declarations that a licence is 'not needed'.

the corporation is often accused of left-wing political bias and a lack of impartiality, which is arguably the biggest factor in public dissatisfaction.

news.title: 🇱🇹 lithuanian border guards have detained 30 migrants who crossed from an underground tunnel at the
news.summary:
🇱🇹 lithuanian border guards have detained 30 migrants who crossed from an underground tunnel at the border with belarus.

on april 6, in the afternoon, the video surveillance system in the vilnius district recorded an unusual case of border violation. a group of 30 migrants illegally crossed the border within a few minutes through an underground tunnel.

according to reports, they are citizens of afghanistan, iraq, and pakistan, with only some presenting identity documents.

news.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 donald 트럼프 said that iran is ready to refrain from obtaining nuclear weapons for more than 20 y
news.summary:
🇺🇸🇮🇷 donald 트럼프 said that iran is ready to refrain from obtaining nuclear weapons for more than 20 years.

“we have a very strong statement that they will not have nuclear weapons for over 20 years. iran wants to make a deal, and we’re getting along very well with them,” 트럼프 told reporters at the 백악관.

he added that a u.s.-iran agreement to end the war is getting closer, with negotiating teams potentially meeting again as soon as this weekend.
